differentials.name: Interstitial gastric emphysema =  gas accumulation in submucosa / subserosa / or both
differentials.raw: Interstitial gastric emphysema =  gas accumulation in submucosa / subserosa / or both

differentials.name: benign clinical course with spontaneous resolution
differentials.raw: benign clinical course with spontaneous resolution

context: Cause:   air from an extrinsic source (a)  obstructive (← raised intragastric pressure): gastric outlet obstruction, volvulus, overinflation during gastroscopy, profuse severe vomiting (b)  pulmonary (← rupture + dissection of subpleural blebs in bullous emphysema along esophageal wall / mediastinum): pulmonary emphysema (c)  traumatic (← mucosal trauma): instrumentation of stomach, recent gastroduodenal surgery, endoscopy (1.6%) √  linear lucency conforming to contour of a thin-walled distended stomach
